name: datasets (HuggingFace Datasets Library)

auth.notes: HF_TOKEN for private datasets; public datasets need no auth

performance.notes: Arrow-backed for fast columnar access; streaming mode for large datasets

agent_readiness.notes: HuggingFace's dataset loading and processing library. from datasets import load_dataset. ds = load_dataset('squad'). ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='data.jsonl'). ds = load_dataset('csv', data_files={'train': 'train.csv', 'test': 'test.csv'}). ds['train'][0] → dict. ds['train']['question'] → list of questions. ds['train'].map(preprocess_fn, batched=True). ds['train'].filter(lambda x: len(x['text']) > 100). ds['train'].shuffle(seed=42). ds['train'].select(range(100)). ds['train'].to_pandas(). ds['train'].to_torch_dataset(). Streaming: load_dataset('c4', streaming=True) → IterableDataset. Dataset.from_pandas(df). DatasetDict. Features schema. push_to_hub('username/dataset'). Arrow-backed memory mapping. 100K+ datasets on Hub. Multilingual, multimodal.

gotchas: First load downloads and caches — subsequent loads from cache
Streaming mode has different API (no random access, no len())
map() with batched=True is much faster than element-wise
Large datasets can fill disk cache — set HF_DATASETS_CACHE
Trust issues: load_dataset from community repos runs Python code — use trust_remote_code carefully
best_when: Loading any of 100K+ datasets from HuggingFace Hub
ML dataset processing pipelines (map, filter, shuffle, split)
Interoperability with HuggingFace transformers and evaluate
Streaming massive datasets that don't fit in memory
avoid_when: Structured tabular data (use pandas or polars directly)
When datasets Hub dependency is undesirable
summary: HuggingFace datasets library loads and processes ML datasets. load_dataset('squad'). .map(fn, batched=True), .filter(), .shuffle(), .select(). .to_pandas(), .to_torch_dataset(). Streaming: load_dataset(..., streaming=True). push_to_hub(). Arrow-backed. 100K+ datasets on Hub. Apache-2.0. Best for any HF ecosystem ML workflow. batched=True for fast map. Streaming for huge datasets. Trust trust_remote_code=True only for trusted sources.
